creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Mon Nov  4 19:58:20 2013
New Revision: 332766
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332766

Log:
  x11-fm/deforaos-browser: update to 0.4.13
  
  - Update to 0.4.13
  - Allow staging
  - Convert lib depends to new format
  
  PR:		ports/183632
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/Makefile
  head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/distinfo
  head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/pkg-plist

Modified: head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/Makefile	Mon Nov  4 19:55:56 2013	(r332765)
+++ head/x11-fm/deforaos-browser/Makefile	Mon Nov  4 19:58:20 2013	(r332766)
@@ -2,9 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	deforaos-browser
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.10
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.13
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fm
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.defora.org/os/download/download/4010/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.defora.org/os/download/download/4310/
 DISTNAME=	Browser-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	olivier@cochard.me
@@ -14,28 +14,17 @@ LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	xsltproc:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libxslt \
 		${LOCALBASE}/share/xsl/docbook/manpages/docbook.xsl:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/docbook-xsl
-LIB_DEPENDS=	System:${PORTSDIR}/devel/deforaos-libsystem \
-		Desktop:${PORTSDIR}/x11/deforaos-libdesktop \
-		Xrandr:${PORTSDIR}/x11/libXrandr
+LIB_DEPENDS=	libSystem.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/deforaos-libsystem \
+		libDesktop.so:${PORTSDIR}/x11/deforaos-libdesktop \
+		libXrandr.so:${PORTSDIR}/x11/libXrandr
 
-USE_GNOME=	gtk20 desktopfileutils
-USES=		pkgconfig gettext
+USE_GNOME=	gtk20
+USES=		desktop-file-utils gettext pkgconfig
 INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 MAKE_ARGS+=	PREFIX=${PREFIX}
 
-MAKE_ENV+=	MANDIR=${MANPREFIX}/man
+MAKE_ENV+=	MANDIR=${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man
 
-MAN1=		browser.1 \
-		copy.1 \
-		delete.1 \
-		desktop.1 \
-		desktopctl.1 \
-		move.1 \
-		open.1 \
-		properties.1 \
-		view.1
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/lib/|/libdata/|g' \
 		${WRKSRC}/data/pkgconfig.sh

==============================================================================

-SIZE (Browser-0.4.10.tar.gz) = 124966

+SIZE (Browser-0.4.13.tar.gz) = 129587

 include/Desktop/Browser/plugin.h
 lib/Browser/plugins/cvs.so
 lib/Browser/plugins/dirtree.so
+lib/Browser/plugins/favorites.so
 lib/Browser/plugins/git.so
+lib/Browser/plugins/make.so
 lib/Browser/plugins/preview.so
 lib/Browser/plugins/properties.so
 lib/Browser/plugins/subversion.so
 lib/Browser/plugins/volumes.so
 libdata/pkgconfig/Browser.pc
+man/man1/browser.1.gz
+man/man1/copy.1.gz
+man/man1/delete.1.gz
+man/man1/desktop.1.gz
+man/man1/desktopctl.1.gz
+man/man1/move.1.gz
+man/man1/open.1.gz
+man/man1/properties.1.gz
+man/man1/view.1.gz
 share/applications/browser.desktop
 share/applications/desktop-settings.desktop
 share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/browser-view-details.png
@@ -27,6 +38,11 @@ share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/Browser.mo
 share/locale/es/LC_MESSAGES/Browser.mo
 share/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/Browser.mo
 share/locale/it/LC_MESSAGES/Browser.mo
+@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps
+@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor/16x16
+@dirrmtry share/icons/hicolor
+@dirrmtry share/icons
 @dirrm include/Desktop/Browser
+@dirrm include/Desktop
 @dirrm lib/Browser/plugins
 @dirrm lib/Browser
